NASA POWER • Florida Weather and Climate

Florida Weather and Climate Dashboard

This static dashboard has the downloaded NASA POWER daily dataset embedded directly in the HTML for Miami, Tampa, Orlando, Jacksonville, and Fort Myers / Cape Coral.
Loading embedded data…
The downloaded NASA POWER CSV is embedded directly in this static HTML file.

1. Weather summary

KPIs update with the current city and date filters. Rainfall is shown as average daily rainfall, not total rainfall.

2. Trends and city comparison

Explore long-term changes and city-to-city differences.

Hover to inspect exact period, value, unit, and city.

Average selected variable by city for the filtered range.

3. Distribution and seasonal rainfall

Histogram distribution and monthly precipitation heatmap support the data story.

Histogram distribution

One selected variable at a time for the current filters.

Precipitation heatmap

Rows show cities, columns show the selected aggregation period, and color intensity shows precipitation.

4. Correlation and map

Correlation uses daily values after filters. The map shows selected Florida cities.

Correlation heatmap

Pairwise Pearson correlations among weather variables.

Florida city map

Zoomable map; bubble size represents filtered observations.

5. Descriptive statistics

Statistics update with all filters.

VariableUnitMeanMinMaxN
Source: NASA POWER Daily API. Data is embedded directly in this static HTML file; the included notebook shows the download process.
